item.arcane-relics.arcane_wand.info.1: Base wand that can be enchanted with arcane power
item.arcane-relics.fire_wand.info.2: Hold use to build fireball power for more damage.
item.arcane-relics.fire_wand.info.3: Can sneak-use with a blaze or ghast nearby to recharge.
item.arcane-relics.ice_wand.info.2: Hold use to create more ice.
item.arcane-relics.ice_wand.info.3: Can sneak-use with a stray skeleton nearby to recharge.
Can sneak-use with a shulker nearby to recharge.
item.arcane-relics.lightning_wand.info.2: Hold use to build lightning power for more damage.
item.arcane-relics.lightning_wand.info.3: At full power a strike causes a block-breaking explosion.
item.arcane-relics.lightning_wand.info.4: Can sneak-use with a lightning rod nearby to recharge.
item.arcane-relics.wind_wand.info.1: Blasts a gust of wind in front of you.
item.arcane-relics.wind_wand.info.2: Hold use to build wind power for more damage.
item.arcane-relics.wind_wand.info.3: Can sneak-use with a breeze mob nearby to recharge.
message.arcane-relics.wand.recharge.alre: The wand is already fully charged
message.arcane-relics.arcane_wand.cast.n: Basic arcane wands have no arcane power
message.arcane-relics.fire_wand.recharge: Recharged to full from nearby blaze
Recharged to full from nearby ghast
No blaze or ghasts found nearby
Recharged to full from nearby stray skeleton
message.arcane-relics.levitation_wand.re: Recharged to full from nearby shulker
message.arcane-relics.lightning_wand.rec: Recharged to full from nearby lightning rod
Lightning rod recharge requires a thunderstorm
message.arcane-relics.wind_wand.recharge: Recharged to full from nearby breeze
